name: lexframe
description: Stage 1 multi-tenant foundation for the LexFrame legal automation platform.

scripts.check:backend: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend test
scripts.check:frontend: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web test
scripts.check:contracts: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/contracts build && corepack pnpm validate:openapi && corepack pnpm validate:json-schemas && corepack pnpm validate:example-workflows && corepack pnpm validate:canvas-fixtures && corepack pnpm validate:release-manifest
scripts.check:activepieces: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/activepieces-legal-pieces lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/activepieces-legal-pieces typecheck && corepack pnpm validate:activepieces-package
scripts.check:security: corepack pnpm validate:stage1-security && corepack pnpm validate:stage11-security && corepack pnpm validate:canvas-security && corepack pnpm validate:web-bundle-secrets && corepack pnpm secret-scan
scripts.canvas:release-gate: corepack pnpm validate:canvas-fixtures && corepack pnpm validate:canvas-release-gates && corepack pnpm validate:release-manifest
scripts.stage17:readiness: node -e "fetch(process.env.STAGE17_READINESS_URL || 'http://localhost:3100/api/readiness/stage17').then(async r => { console.log(JSON.stringify(await r.json(), null, 2)); process.exit(r.status >= 500 ? 1 : 0); }).catch(error => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.stage17:17.5:check: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/contracts typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/api-client typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend test -- activepieces && corepack pnpm security:scan-secrets
scripts.stage17:17.5:release-gate: corepack pnpm stage17:17.5:check && corepack pnpm stage17:evidence
scripts.stage17:17.8:check: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/design-system-activepieces-bridge build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/design-system-activepieces-bridge test && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/e2e typecheck && corepack pnpm stage17:17.8:gate && corepack pnpm security:scan-secrets
scripts.stage17:test:unit: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend test -- local-owner-key-vault activepieces-role-mapper activepieces-jwt-signer activepieces-pieces-policy && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/design-system-activepieces-bridge test
scripts.stage17:test:integration: corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/backend test -- activepieces ai-gateway readiness
scripts.check: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm check:contracts && corepack pnpm check:backend && corepack pnpm check:frontend && corepack pnpm check:db && corepack pnpm check:ai && corepack pnpm check:activepieces && corepack pnpm check:security && corepack pnpm check:e2e
